headline: 3 Reasons to Sell CSCO and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Cisco’s 11.6% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 8.5%, and its stock price has climbed to $76.02 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: 3 Growth Stocks We Steer Clear Of
summary: Growth is oxygen. But when it evaporates, the consequences can be severe - ask anyone who bought Cisco in the Dot-Com Bubble or newer investors who lived through the 2020 to 2022 COVID cycle.

headline: Networking now 30% of HPE revenue but over half of profits
summary: There’s a line buried in HPE’s latest earnings commentary that tells you everything about where this company is headed. An HPE executive put it plainly: “Networking, which now represents 30% of our revenue and more than half of our profits.” That single sentence is the thesis. Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) just posted Q1 FY2026 total ... Networking now 30% of HPE revenue but over half of profits

headline: Nvidia Invests In Mira Murati's AI Startup Thinking Machines
summary: Nvidia is doubling down on Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab with a major investment and a multiyear deal to deploy next-gen Vera Rubin AI systems — despite the startup's recent internal turbulence.

headline: Nvidia plans open-source AI agent platform ‘NemoClaw’ for enterprises: Wired
summary: Nvidia is planning to lean into the agentic AI craze and launch an open-source platform for AI agents called 'NemoClaw,' according to a report.
